name: Federica Bianco
summary: Astrophysicist and data-science specialist who served on NASA's UAP Independent Study Team.
profileSummary: Astrophysicist and data-science specialist who served on NASA's UAP Independent Study Team.
background: Astrophysicist and deputy project scientist for the Vera C. Rubin Observatory.
inclusionNote: Included because NASA appointed her to contribute observational astronomy, survey science, and large-scale data-analysis expertise.
